title: Course: COSC 112 - Introduction to Computer Science II
description: Second computer science course covering data structures including lists, tuples, and dictionaries; functions and modules; string handling; file input/output; exception handling; recursion; and introduction to classes and objects. Includes lab work with programming assignments using editors to compile and execute large programs.
prerequisites_text: COSC 111 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 112 - Introduction to Computer Science II
Credits: 4
Prerequisites: COSC 111 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: Fall, Spring

Description: Second computer science course covering data structures including lists, tuples, and dictionaries; functions and modules; string handling; file input/output; exception handling; recursion; and introduction to classes and objects. Includes lab work with programming assignments using editors to compile and execute large programs.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Core
  - BS Cloud Computing: Core
  - Required for CS Minor

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55566
